import { Link } from "react-router-dom"; import { motion } from "framer-motion"; import { MapPin, Phone, Mail, Facebook, Instagram, Twitter, Youtube, ArrowUpRight, Heart, Mountain, Send, } from "lucide-react"; const quickLinks = [ { name: "Home", href: "#home" }, { name: "Destinations", href: "#destinations" }, { name: "Our Guides", href: "#features" }, { name: "How It Works", href: "#how-it-works" }, { name: "Testimonials", href: "#testimonials" }, ]; const destinations = [ "Annapurna Circuit", "Everest Base Camp", "Langtang Valley", "Upper Mustang", "Manaslu Circuit", "Rara Lake", ]; const socials = [ { icon: Facebook, href: "#", label: "Facebook" }, { icon: Instagram, href: "#", label: "Instagram" }, { icon: Twitter, href: "#", label: "Twitter" }, { icon: Youtube, href: "#", label: "YouTube" }, ]; export const Footer = () => { const scrollToSection = (href) => { if (href.startsWith("#")) { const el = document.querySelector(href); if (el) el.scrollIntoView({ behavior: "smooth" }); } }; return (
